**AFTER DOWNLOADING MAKE SURE YOU HAVE THE IMAGE EXPANSION AND IMAGE HOVER FROM 4CHANS SETTINGS MENU  DISABLED EVERYTHING ELSE IS FINE, THE MENU IS LOCATED IN THE TOP RIGHT OF THE SCREEN**

This extension is a script that adds various features to the image board 4chan and 4channel these features include:


-Image hover preview:
Hover your mouse over an image to get a preview of the higher quality version theres 2 versions no1. dynamic positioning you can move the preview left and right by moving your cursor left and right. no2. the default hover behaviour non moving placed on the right of the screen.

-Image grid:
Creates a grid of all images within the thread if you click on an image it can take you to a fullscreen version of the image or to the post in the thread depending on what you choose in the settings menu.

-Load images as you scroll the thread option:
This utilizes an infinite scroll tactic to lazy load images in as you will need them this is recommended for bigger threads with a lot of images to save your bandwith.

-Mass downloading images in thread with original file names:
Added the option to mass download images with their original file names make sure you have the option "Ask where to save each file before downloading" which is located via settings -> downloads if this is left on when mass downloading you will be prompted to save every file you have selected to download.

-Full screen image viewing:
You can click on an image in the image grid to go fullscreen on the image 

-Slideshow functionality:
This allows you to view all images in the thread via a fullscreen slideshow with personalizable slide interval length.

-Expand all images
This will go through and expand all images and videos in the thread 

-Customizable keybinds 
I have provided many keybinds in the settings menu that you can customize to your liking these include: Keybind to instantly go to image grid, Keybind to expand all images, Keybind to go fullscreen, Keybind to go to the top of the thread and Keybind to go to the bottom of the thread.
T-Bargain Scraper: Export Listings, Sellers, Reviews & More
Temu Scraper: Extract product varieties, order history, cart items & provider data. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX instantly.

This browser extension lets you extract product information, reviews, order history, and seller details directly from Temu. Capture data from search results, category pages, product listings, and personal account sections with ease. All processing runs locally in your browser, requiring no external API configuration. Built-in monitoring tools allow you to track listing changes and receive alerts automatically.

Key Features

✓ Monitor Temu listings for price drops and stock changes with alerts
✓ All scraping and data processing performed locally in your browser
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON
✓ Automatic pagination for multi-page search results
✓ Batch processing for scraping multiple product pages at once
✓ Customizable field selection and conditional formatting
✓ Dedicated modes for products, reviews, orders, and provider data

What Data You Can Extract

Products and Details: Titles, URLs, pricing, discount percentages, sales counts, stock status, ratings, review counts, category paths, and available colors.
Varieties and SKUs: Specific variant specs, images, SKU IDs, and size measurements.
Reviews: Comments, star ratings, reviewer names, dates, images, videos, and helpfulness counts.
Provider Info: Shop names, follower counts, total sales, and provider ratings.
Orders and Cart: Order numbers, status, shipping tracking, payment totals, and individual cart item specifications.

Monitoring and Alerts

Use the Page Watcher to track changes on any Temu product page or search listing over time. Set conditions on specific fields such as price, discount percentage, or stock status. Receive notifications via webhook or ntfy.sh whenever your defined conditions are met, so you stay informed about deals and restocks without manual checking.

Batch Processing

The Batch URL Opener lets you queue multiple Temu product URLs for automated scraping. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from search results and category pages. The extension processes each page sequentially, gathering data and compiling results into a single export file.

Export Formats

CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, Raw JSON

Perfect For

This extension is ideal for bargain hunters, resellers, and market researchers who need to track Temu product listings and pricing trends. It simplifies archiving purchase history, comparing seller offerings, and cataloging product variations across the marketplace.

Supported Regions

This extension works across Temu global domains, supporting various regional versions of the site for worldwide data extraction.

Privacy and Security

All scraping and exports are processed locally on your machine. General usage metrics are collected to improve the extension, but no scraped content is transmitted to external servers.

Usage Notice

This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support

For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark

Temu is a registered trademark of PDD Holdings Inc. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by PDD Holdings Inc.
Quickly navigate from a live web page to its corresponding entry in Contentstack

How does it work?

If you are on a web page of a site that is powered by Contentstack, and if you have the permission to edit its content, you will see an edit button at the right/left bottom of the page. Clicking this button will take you to the corresponding entry in Contenstack, where you can edit the entry. 

This eliminates the need to search for specific entries within Contentstack’s web application and provides an intuitive editing experience for users who need to quickly find and update content. 


How to set up the extension?

1. Add this extension by clicking on the Add to Chrome button.

2. Once installed, a pop-up will prompt you to enter the stack details, datacenter region (North America, Europe, & Other), and button preferences. Provide the necessary details in each field (all fields are mandatory) and then save the configuration.

3. Add the following attributes to the body tag of your website’s page templates:

a. data-pageref: Used to identify the entry UID of the current page
b. data-contenttype: Used to identify the content type UID of the entry
c. data-locale: Used to identify the local of the entry for the current page

Here’s an example of how to add these details in your code:

<body data-pageref="bltb8b487559a1b715d" data-contenttype="product" data-locale="en-us">

In the above example:

"bltb8b487559a1b715d" is the UID of the entry
"product" is the UID of the content type
"en-us" is the locale of the entry of the corresponding web page

4. Go to the tab in your Chrome browser where you want to use this extension, and reload or refresh the page.
Note: This is a one-time activity when you add a new domain or an API key.

5. The Edit button will now be visible on your Contentstack-powered web pages.

For more details on the extension, visit our GitHub page: https://github.com/contentstack/contentstack-chrome-extension.git

Y-Videos Scraper: Export Channels, Playlists, Comments & More
Youtube Scraper: Collect video details, captions, Shorts & community posts. Export to CSV, JSON, XLSX easily.

Scrape and monitor video platform data with this feature-rich browser extension. This tool extracts videos, channels, playlists, comments, captions, community posts, and Shorts directly from Youtube pages. Everything is processed locally in your browser, and built-in monitoring lets you track subscriber counts, new uploads, or comment activity with automated alerts.

Key Features
✓ Monitor any Youtube page for changes with customizable conditions and real-time alerts
✓ All data processing runs locally in your browser for maximum privacy
✓ Export to CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, and Raw JSON formats
✓ Automatic pagination and infinite scroll support for comprehensive data collection
✓ Batch process multiple video or channel URLs in a single session
✓ Customizable field selection to export only the data you need
✓ Ten distinct scraping modes covering every major content type

What Data You Can Extract

Videos: Title, channel name, channel URL, views, upload date, duration, thumbnail URL, video URL, description, and video ID.

Video Details: Video ID, title, description, view count, duration in seconds, keywords, channel name, channel ID, category, publish date, upload date, live status, family-safe flag, unlisted status, and thumbnail URL.

Captions from Video: Start time (ms), duration (ms), text content, formatted start time, and formatted end time.

Comments from a Video: Content, published time, formatted date, author name, author channel ID, author channel URL, author avatar URL, verified status, like count, and reply count.

Playlists: Playlist title, playlist ID, video count, thumbnail URL, playlist URL, update date, and first video ID.

Playlist Details: Title, video count, view count, last updated, channel name, channel URL, thumbnail URL, description, playlist URL, and playlist ID.

Channel Details: Channel name, description, country, subscriber count, view count, joined date, channel URL, video count, custom links, and channel ID.

Channel Posts: Author name, author channel URL, content, published time, like count, comment count, image URL, post URL, total votes, and post ID.

Shorts: Title, thumbnail URL, view count, short URL, accessibility text, and short ID.

Short Details: Like count, timestamp, title, channel name, channel URL, subscription status, comment count, share URL, and short ID.

Monitoring & Alerts
Page Watcher lets you track changes on any Youtube page automatically. Set specific conditions on fields such as subscriber milestones, new video uploads, or comment count thresholds, and receive instant notifications via webhook or ntfy.sh when those conditions are met.

Batch Processing
Batch URL Opener allows you to queue multiple Youtube video or channel URLs and process them all at once. Add URLs manually or auto-collect them from search result pages, then batch-scrape and export everything in a single operation.

Export Formats
- CSV
- Excel (XLSX)
- JSON
- HTML Table
- Raw JSON

Perfect For
This tool is ideal for content creators analyzing competitor channels, researchers studying engagement patterns, and marketers who need to collect and compare Youtube video and channel data at scale.

Supported Regions
The extension supports Youtube globally across all regions and languages, including youtube.com and youtu.be domains.

Privacy & Security
All scraping and data exports are processed locally in your browser. No scraped data is sent to external servers. General usage metrics are collected to help improve the extension.

Usage Notice
This extension provides tools for extracting publicly available data. Users are responsible for ensuring their use complies with applicable terms of service and local regulations. The developer provides the tool and is not liable for how it is used.

Technical Support
For assistance or questions, contact hello@nifty.codes.

Trademark
YouTube is a registered trademark of Google LLC. This extension is an independent tool and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, authorized, maintained, or sponsored by Google LLC.

Export Formats

CSV, Excel (XLSX), JSON, HTML Table, Raw JSON

Perfect For

This extension works globally on the Twitter (X.com) domain. It supports all regions where Twitter is accessible.

Plays sounds when starting or finishing navigation or a download, when typing on a website, or when opening or closing a tab.

Do you remember the classic sounds of the old Internet Explorer when clicking, when a page finished loading, or when a download completed? This extension brings those sounds back and adds other events, such as when typing in a text field or opening and closing a tab. In the options window, you can activate, deactivate, and customize the sounds to your liking.

𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗙𝗲𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀:

	v 2.1
		· Added the options page, where you can enable or disable events and customize sounds.
		· Default setting changed to disabled for keypress sound
		· Added events for opening and closing tabs.

	v 2.0
		· Mandatory update to Manifest 3.0 (which is more restrictive with sound playback).
		· Added the event for typing in a text field.

𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞:

Information about automatic sound playback:

Due to Chrome's policies, extensions that attempt to play sound automatically may not work properly. The most effective solution I've found is to close all Chrome instances and start the browser with this setting:

	chrome.exe --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required

...or if you use Edge:

	msedge.exe --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required

This allows any page, including this extension, to play sounds without user interaction. However, keep in mind that this setting removes restrictions for all websites, which may result in unexpected behavior on sites with unwanted automatic sound.

For more details, check Chrome's official documentation:
https://developer.chrome.com/blog/autoplay#developer_switches

It’s also important to note that sound cards, after a period of inactivity, often enter power-saving mode. Since the sounds in this extension are very short, they may not be heard immediately at first.

𝗞𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝘁𝗵𝗶𝘀 𝗲𝘅𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘃𝗲!!

Email Extractor: Find, Export Email & Leads From Any Website
The extension scan webpages for Lead & Prospect Generation

Email Extractor scan each page you visit and find all the email address.
You can then extract the email address into a CSV and save it with one click.

✨ Key Features
- 0-Click Email Extraction: Instantly scrape emails from LinkedIn, company websites, social media, and more.
- Bulk Automation: Export hundreds of contacts at once from LinkedIn groups, events, or custom URL queues.
- Hidden Email Detection: Extract emails from page source code, AJAX content, or JavaScript.
- Local Mode: Scan emails from local HTML and PDF files.
- Since email extractor version 1.4 and 1.6 Lite more languages are being added.

🔍 Where It Works
Extract Emails from:
- LinkedIn (profiles, groups, Sales Navigator)
- Company Websites (team pages, contact forms)
- Google Maps Listings (local businesses)
- Social Media (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram bios)
- Job Boards (Indeed, Glassdoor postings)
- Event Platforms (Eventbrite, Meetup attendees)

🚀 Why Choose Email Export?
- Lightning-Fast: Scan and export 1,000+ contacts in seconds.
- Accuracy Guaranteed: Built-in email validation and duplicate removal.
- Free Tier: Get the first 25 email address free.
- Privacy First: All data is stored locally on your machine

📥 How It Works
- Install the Chrome Addon (30 seconds).
- Go to on any web page where you think there are emails.
- The extension detect and save emails automatically.
- Export results to CSV and start your outreach

💡 Perfect For
- Sales teams scaling outreach
- Recruiters sourcing top talent
- Marketers building email lists
- Founders and agencies identifying leads

🌟 Install Now & Supercharge Your Lead Generation!
Free plan available. No credit card required.

🔒 Data Security:
This extension scans web pages to extract email addresses. All extracted data is stored locally on your device and is not transmitted or shared externally. The extension does not collect any personal or sensitive user data.

🛠️ Support & Feedback
This extension has been thoroughly tested.
If you encounter any issues or bugs, please report them at: support@emailextractor.tools.
Your feedback is valued, and any reported issues will be addressed promptly.
